query: SELECT id, title, description FROM helpVideos WHERE description LIKE '%employee@catalyst%' OR tags LIKE '%employee@catalyst%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rf57goPWjFduX1.root --database dDLjqN8avGrS9FkSAJP3wb --execute SELECT id, title, description FROM helpVideos WHERE description LIKE '%employee@catalyst%' OR tags LIKE '%employee@catalyst%'
